Sports Scene

Copied

A total of 18 gold medals are there for grabs on Wednesday at the 2024 Summer Olympic Games. CGTN Sports Scene has recommended the following events for your attention:

The cycling BMX freestyle women's park final will happen at Place de la Concorde in Paris at 13:10 (GMT+2).

Sun Jiaqi and Deng Yawen of China will participate in the shooting trap women's final at National Shooting Center at 15:30 (GMT+2).

The artistic gymnastics men's all-round final will take place at the Bercy Arena at 17:30 (GMT+2).

Then at 20:30, China's Yang Junxuan will compete with the world's top swimmers in the women's 100-meter freestyle final at 20:30 (GMT+2) in the Olympic Aquatics Centre at the Paris La Defense Arena.
